title: Angel Island Welcomes the Crew
description: Conis and Pagaya introduce the crew to dials and wavers while Skypiea’s peaceful surface hides danger ahead.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Nami, Luffy, Usopp, Conis, Zoro. Conis and Pagaya introduce the crew to dials and wavers while Skypiea’s peaceful surface hides danger ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...how can she navigate it so easily

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: When it shakes so badly? A

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ouch!! I bit my tongue, Sanji--!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Clouds can be cut into blocks...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That is an artificial cloud canal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sea clouds and island clouds are created.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: --Nonetheless, the milky road I mentioned before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And then after some density manipulations,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These artificial cloud products were created.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is my home! Please come in.

summary: Conis and Pagaya introduce the crew to dials and wavers while Skypiea’s peaceful surface hides danger ahead.
